creator: john@jmarshall.id.au
text:
(In reply to Joe Marcus Clarke from comment #6)
Thank you, Joe!

I had the same problem with 3.1.13_1 of the port on 13.1-STABLE with a UFS2 filesystem and macOS 12.3.1 clients doing (trying to do) Time Machine backups. Built and installed 3.1.13_2 of the port and all is happy again.  Thank you!
